title: Cyberware & Humanity Manager
description: GURPS Cyberpunk module for managing cyberware installation and humanity degradation. Provides calculation tools and GM notifications without forcing automation.

recommends.reason: Enables automatic countdown of temporary traits assigned after failed cyberware adaptation checks. Without it, trait durations must be tracked manually.
Alternative to Calendaria. If Simple Calendar is installed and its integration setting is enabled, temporary trait durations will be tracked automatically as in-game days pass.
